EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to update the settings of protected application {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to update node {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to update the account {object.account.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to update report "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} updated listening IP address {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} updated the settings of protected application {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to update private SSL key {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} updated traffic profile "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} updated the account {object.account.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to update listening IP address {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} updated object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}

The user {subject.account.name} updated private SSL key {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to update rule "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}

The user {subject.account.name} updated node {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to update traffic profile "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} updated rule "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
